privacyConsent.title: Privacy preferences

roles_tab.permViewDesc: Can see the schedule, members, and alerts. Cannot make any changes.

roles_tab.permOwnerDesc: Full access - can publish schedules, manage roles, and transfer ownership.

errors.swapInvalidOwnership: You do not own this shift
errors.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to perform this action
errors.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.cancellationReasonTooLong: Cancellation reason must be 500 characters or less
errors.invalidTimeRange: Start time must be before end time

operations.title: Self-service operations
operations.description: Run the current cycle, watch coverage, and jump into the queues that need admin action.

guide.title: How to run the cycle
guide.description: A simple rhythm for manual self-service scheduling: prepare the rules, open the window, review exceptions, then tune the next cycle.

prepare.title: Prepare
prepare.description: Set policy, confirm templates, generate the cycle, and check expected capacity.

open.title: Open
open.description: Open the request window and let members pick shifts, join waitlists, and propose swaps.

review.title: Review
review.description: Handle absences, shift-change requests, special leave, under-filled slots, and urgent overrides.

improve.title: Improve
improve.description: After the cycle, review late reports, cancellations, overrides, and adjust the next policy.

reviews.title: Review requests
reviews.description: Approve absence reports, shift-change requests, and time-off requests.

waitlist.title: Waitlist queue
waitlist.description: See who is waiting or holding an offer when full shifts open up.

overrides.title: Manual overrides
overrides.description: Assign or remove members when the schedule needs a direct correction.

templates.title: Shift templates
templates.description: Adjust the slots generated for upcoming self-service cycles.

policy.title: Policy settings
policy.description: Tune limits, windows, cutoffs, and waitlist offer timing.

cycle.title: Cycle controls
cycle.description: Generate slots, manage the request window, and check shift coverage.
cycle.noCycle: No upcoming self-service cycle exists yet.
cycle.underScheduledNone: Everyone meets the minimum shift requirement.

closeChecklist.title: Close readiness
closeChecklist.description: Review these signals before closing the request window.

reviews.label: Review queues
reviews.ok: No pending absence, change, or time-off reviews.

waitlist.label: Waitlist
waitlist.ok: No active waitlist entries or offers.

underScheduled.label: Minimum shifts
underScheduled.ok: Everyone meets the minimum after the latest check.
underScheduled.unknown: Run the under-scheduled check before closing.

pick.title: Pick shifts
pick.description: Browse open shifts and request another slot when needed.
pick.underMinimum: You are below the minimum for this cycle. Pick another shift if you can.

waitlist.title: Waitlist
waitlist.description: Track waiting positions and offers for full shifts.
waitlist.offer: You have a waitlist offer waiting for action.

swaps.title: Swaps
swaps.description: Review incoming swaps or propose a swap with another member.

requests.title: Requests
requests.description: {changes} shift-change and {absences} absence report(s) are waiting for review.

leave.title: Time off
leave.description: Track special leave requests and submit new time-off when needed.

rules.title: Rules
rules.shiftRangeValue: Pick at least {min} and at most {max} shifts per cycle.
rules.requestWindowValue: Usually opens {open}h before the cycle and closes {close}h before it starts.
rules.cancellationValue: Regular cancellation closes {hours}h before shift start.
rules.lateAbsenceValue: {used}/{max} used. Reports inside the last {hours}h count as late.
rules.waitlistValue: When offered a full shift, you have {minutes} minutes to accept.

trialBanner.subscriptionEnded: Your subscription has ended. Renew to continue using the automatic scheduler.
trialBanner.canceledAccessExpires: Your subscription was canceled. Access ends in {days} days.
trialBanner.expiresNoRenew: Your subscription expires in {days} days and will not auto-renew.
trialBanner.trialEnded: Your trial has ended. Upgrade to continue using the automatic scheduler.

offlineBanner.noInternet: You are not connected to the internet
offlineBanner.clickToUpdate: Click to update to the latest version

assistant.title: Shifter Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Help, support, and schedule guidance
assistant.welcome: Hi. Ask me about Shifter, schedules, imports, settings, or support. I can guide you, but I will not change anything without you.
assistant.fallback: I could not answer right now. Try again or send feedback to support.
assistant.noSpace: Select a space first so I can answer in the right workspace context.
assistant.supportNoSpace: I can still help you contact human support. Open the support request and send the details to Ofek.
assistant.supportOpened: I opened a support request. When you submit it, it will be sent to {email}.

quick.import: How do I import a schedule?

pwaInstall.title: Install Shifter
pwaInstall.description: Install Shifter on this computer or phone for faster access and offline schedule viewing.
pwaInstall.iosDescription: On iPhone, tap Share, then Add to Home Screen to install Shifter.
